title: Meow-Cart
description: Changes boring TNT&TNT-Minecart explosion sound to a cute Meow :3
body:
Changes explosion sound for TNT and TNT-Minecart to a meow :3
Also changes cart move sounds.
![Cat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe745761b60f7d92222ba858858efe4e7abd7e4b.webp)

I may change TNT-cart design in future versions of this pack and make it easier to modify!
I will try updating it once new minecraft versions come out, i will try to add new stuff without making the pack different
